'''âk-z-sh''' ('''kazasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mongrelize|mongrelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mongrelize|mongrelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-z-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kazasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kazashithi|kazashithi]] || [[word:kazashiji|kazashiji]] || [[word:kazashishi|kazashishi]] || [[word:kazashi|kazashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazashuthuth|kazashuthuth]] || [[word:kazashujuj|kazashujuj]] || [[word:kazashushush|kazashushush]] || [[word:kazash|kazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazashuthu|kazashuthu]] || [[word:kazashuju|kazashuju]] || [[word:kazashushu|kazashushu]] || [[word:kazashu|kazashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazashufuth|kazashufuth]] || [[word:kazashufuj|kazashufuj]] || [[word:kazashufush|kazashufush]] || [[word:kazashuf|kazashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kazashethe|kazashethe]] || [[word:kazasheje|kazasheje]] || [[word:kazasheshe|kazasheshe]] || [[word:kazashe|kazashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazashothoth|kazashothoth]] || [[word:kazashojoj|kazashojoj]] || [[word:kazashoshosh|kazashoshosh]] || [[word:kazash|kazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazashotho|kazashotho]] || [[word:kazashojo|kazashojo]] || [[word:kazashosho|kazashosho]] || [[word:kazasho|kazasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazashofoth|kazashofoth]] || [[word:kazashofoj|kazashofoj]] || [[word:kazashofosh|kazashofosh]] || [[word:kazashof|kazashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kazashĂŠthĂŠ|kazashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kazashĂŠjĂŠ|kazashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kazashĂŠshĂŠ|kazashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kazashĂŠ|kazashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazashathath|kazashathath]] || [[word:kazashajaj|kazashajaj]] || [[word:kazashashash|kazashashash]] || [[word:kazash|kazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazashatha|kazashatha]] || [[word:kazashaja|kazashaja]] || [[word:kazashasha|kazashasha]] || [[word:kazasha|kazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazashafath|kazashafath]] || [[word:kazashafaj|kazashafaj]] || [[word:kazashafash|kazashafash]] || [[word:kazashaf|kazashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kazashasha|kazashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokazashasha|gokazashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikazashasha|gokikazashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kazashnĂŒsha|kazashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokazashnknĂŒsha|gokazashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikazashnĂŒsha|gokikazashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kazashĂ«sha|kazashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokazashnkshĂ«sha|gokazashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikazashĂ«sha|gokikazashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazashrosha|kazashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazashnkrosha|gokazashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazashrosha|gokikazashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kazashmusha|kazashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazashnkmusha|gokazashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazashmusha|gokikazashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kazasherasha|kazasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokazashnksherasha|gokazashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikazasherasha|gokikazasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kazashngasha|kazashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokazashnkngasha|gokazashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikazashngasha|gokikazashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kazashyasha|kazashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokazashnkyasha|gokazashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikazashyasha|gokikazashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kazashyamasha|kazashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokazashnkyamasha|gokazashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikazashyamasha|gokikazashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kazashnĂŒshĂ«sha|kazashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokazashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokazashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikazashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikazashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazashnĂŒrosha|kazashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazashnknĂŒrosha|gokazashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazashnĂŒrosha|gokikazashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazashnĂŒmusha|kazashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazashnknĂŒmusha|gokazashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazashnĂŒmusha|gokikazashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kazashĂ«nĂŒsha|kazashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokazashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokazashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikazashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikazashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazashĂ«rosha|kazashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazashnkshĂ«rosha|gokazashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazashĂ«rosha|gokikazashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazashĂ«musha|kazashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazashnkshĂ«musha|gokazashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazashĂ«musha|gokikazashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kazashronĂŒsha|kazashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokazashnkronĂŒsha|gokazashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikazashronĂŒsha|gokikazashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kazashroshĂ«sha|kazashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokazashnkroshĂ«sha|gokazashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikazashroshĂ«sha|gokikazashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazashromusha|kazashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazashnkromusha|gokazashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazashromusha|gokikazashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kazashmunĂŒsha|kazashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokazashnkmunĂŒsha|gokazashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikazashmunĂŒsha|gokikazashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kazashmushĂ«sha|kazashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokazashnkmushĂ«sha|gokazashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikazashmushĂ«sha|gokikazashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazashmurosha|kazashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazashnkmurosha|gokazashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazashmurosha|gokikazashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kazash|kazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠsh|kĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokazash|hokazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠzĂŠsh|hokĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokazash|hohokazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠzĂŠsh|hohokĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkazash|nĂŒkazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠzĂŠsh|nĂŒkĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkazash|nĂŒnĂŒkazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠzĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkazash|nĂŻkazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠzĂŠsh|nĂŻkĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkazash|nĂŻnĂŻkazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠzĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukazash|lukazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠzĂŠsh|lukĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukazash|lulukazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠzĂŠsh|lulukĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likazash|likazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠzĂŠsh|likĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikazash|lilikazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠzĂŠsh|lilikĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokazash|kokazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠzĂŠsh|kokĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokazash|kokokazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠzĂŠsh|kokokĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekazash|kekazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠzĂŠsh|kekĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekazash|kekekazash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠzĂŠsh|kekekĂŠzĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
